scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate --workspace backend/quote-service && npm run prisma:generate --workspace backend/policy-service
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm run prisma:migrate --workspace backend/quote-service && npm run prisma:migrate --workspace backend/policy-service
scripts.prisma:seed: npm run prisma:seed --workspace backend/quote-service && npm run prisma:seed --workspace backend/policy-service
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n gateway,quote,policy,frontend -c cyan,green,magenta,blue "npm run dev --workspace backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace backend/quote-service" "npm run dev --workspace backend/policy-service" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n postgres,gateway,quote,policy,frontend -c yellow,cyan,green,magenta,blue "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev --workspace backend/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace backend/quote-service" "npm run dev --workspace backend/policy-service" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend/shared && npm run lint --workspace backend/api-gateway && npm run lint --workspace backend/quote-service && npm run lint --workspace backend/policy-service && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace backend/shared && npm run test --workspace backend/api-gateway && npm run test --workspace backend/quote-service && npm run test --workspace backend/policy-service && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration --workspace backend/quote-service && npm run test:integration --workspace backend/policy-service
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend/shared && npm run build --workspace backend/api-gateway && npm run build --workspace backend/quote-service && npm run build --workspace backend/policy-service && npm run build --workspace frontend
